regime.action: Uptrend + positive 12m momentum, contained vol — deploy on schedule / accelerate low-regret anchors.
regime.basis: trend(200-DMA)+abs-momentum(12m)+vol-state+drawdown, +20-DMA fast re-entry +VIX/HY macro overlay; see REGIME.md
